name: cud-chew
short_effect: Causes the Pokémon to reuse an already consumed Berry at the end of the next turn.
effect_text: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.
flavor_text: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.
